sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114464" key="xoropai/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορο-παίκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.108</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Myrin.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
